matchups.deciding_factor: Data agents split (Statistical 54% Arizona, Matchup 62% Duke). Statistical below 56% threshold — tiebreaker void. Agents 2-2. Situational tiebreaker: Matchup Analyst identified structural schematic advantages — Boozer's dual-threat scoring forces Arizona's 2PT defense into compromise, Duke's slow pace suppresses Arizona's paint-volume offense, and Arizona's 4th-lowest 3PT attempt rate leaves no perimeter counter. Duke already won 100-93 head-to-head this tournament. Ngongba day-to-day (not confirmed out) — insufficient for factual override.
